prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西南大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学主榜排名从2021年第68名持续上升至2026年第61名，学校综合实力稳步提升，对考生吸引力增 强；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，主要涉及校园外卖管理争议，无重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第38位（较热），短视频曝光量较高，反映报考关注度处于 中等偏上水平；近年无投档断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，心理学获评A、教育学获评A、马克思主义理论获评A-，师范与心理学特色突出；与招生专业关联密切 的计算机、电子信息等工科专业虽未单独评级，但学校综合实力支撑较强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等工科专业社会热度持续高 热，西南大学在上述领域均有招生；江西省2026年物理类考生约26.79万人（按近年比例估算），较2025年26.64万人微增约0.55%，竞争略有加剧；西南大学位于重庆市，属西南地区综合性大学，对江西省考生而言属跨省报考，近年该校在江西省招生计划稳定在156–181人之间，无明显地域偏好变 化。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次45471名、2026年计划微降0.55%、考生总数微增0.55%、软科排名持续上升及工科专业热度较高等因素，预计2026年物理类竞争较2025 年略有加剧，位次小幅前移。预测最低位次约45270名，区间44770–45770名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including former Science Category) were approximately 22969 → 22416 → 19531 → 23025 → 45471. From 2021 to 2024, rankings fluctuated narrowly within the 19531–23025 range. In 2025, unpopular major groups such as Biomass Science and Engineering lowered the school line to 45471, while actual mainstream major groups (e.g., Computer Science, Electrical Engineering) still had rankings between 10,000 and 27,000. Over the past five years, the overall trend has been backward, with a baseline ranking of approximately 45471 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jiangxi Province: 2021: 156 → 2022: 158 → 2023: 159 → 2024: 161 → 2025: 181 → 2026: 180. The 2026 plan is slightly reduced by 1 person (-0.55%) compared to 2025, a minor contraction with limited impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Southwest University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science Chinese University Main Ranking has steadily risen from 68th in 2021 to 61st in 2026, indicating a continuous improvement in comprehensive strength, enhancing its appeal to candidates. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving campus food delivery management disputes, with no major negative public opinion. Its Douyin popularity ranks 38th (relatively hot), with high short video exposure, reflecting a moderately high level of application attention. There have been no records of enrollment gaps in recent years. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Psychology was rated A, Education was rated A, and Marxist Theory was rated A-, highlighting strengths in teacher training and psychology. Although engineering majors closely related to enrollment, such as Computer Science and Electronic Information, have not been individually rated, the university's comprehensive strength provides strong support.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly popular in society, and Southwest University enrolls students in these fields. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Jiangxi Province is approximately 267,900 (estimated based on recent proportions), a slight increase of about 0.55% from 266,400 in 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition. Southwest University is located in Chongqing, a comprehensive university in the southwestern region, and is a cross-provincial application for Jiangxi candidates. In recent years, its enrollment plan in Jiangxi Province has been stable between 156 and 181 people, with no significant changes in regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 45471, a 0.55% decrease in the 2026 plan, a 0.55% increase in the total number of candidates, the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking, and the high popularity of engineering majors, it is expected that competition in Physics Category in 2026 will be slightly more intense than in 2025, with rankings moving slightly forward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 45270, with a range of 44770–45770.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Electronic Information (Electronic Information Engineering, Communication Engineering)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Mathematics (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Statistics).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)

- Applied Psychology

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Plant Production (Agronomy, Horticulture, Plant Protection)
- Veterinary Medicine (Rongchang Campus)
- Aquaculture (Rongchang Campus)
- Biomass Science and Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 44770–45770, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (e.g., within 44000), you can focus on aiming for popular Tier 1 majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Electrical Engineering. If your ranking is close to the upper limit (e.g., beyond 45500), it is recommended to primarily use Tier 3 majors as safety options, while also paying attention to majors at the Rongchang Campus.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (including former Liberal Arts) were approximately 3271 → 3461 → 3042 → 7361 → 4283. Rankings fluctuated narrowly between 3042 and 3461 from 2021 to 2023; in 2024, due to the first year of Jiangxi's new college entrance examination reform, the subject category changed from Liberal Arts to History Category, causing a significant drop to 7361; in 2025, it quickly rebounded to 4283, indicating candidates' adaptation to the new exam model and the return of the university's appeal. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 4283. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Jiangxi Province: 2021: 25 students → 2022: 29 → 2023: 29 → 2024: 28 → 2025: 32 → 2026: 33. The 2026 plan increases by 1 student (+3.125%) compared to 2025, a slight expansion, easing competition slightly. Southwest University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university; its main ranking in the Shanghai Ranking's Chinese University Rankings has steadily risen from 68th in 2021 to 61st in 2026, reflecting continuous improvement in overall strength and increasing appeal to candidates.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly involving campus food delivery management disputes, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranks 38th (relatively hot), with high short video exposure; no recent enrollment gaps or interruptions; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Psychology received an A rating, Education received an A, and Marxist Theory received an A-, highlighting strengths in teacher training and psychology; Chinese Language and Literature, History, Law, and other liberal arts majors are closely related to the university's advantageous disciplines. Law, Chinese Language/Literature, and other liberal arts majors are socially popular and recommended; teacher training/education majors are polarized and await observation. In 2026, the number of History Category candidates in Jiangxi Province is approximately 207,000 (estimated based on recent proportions), a slight increase of about 0.46% from 206,100 in 2025, intensifying competition slightly.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Southwest University is located in Chongqing, a comprehensive university in the Southwest region, and is an inter-provincial choice for Jiangxi candidates; its enrollment plan for History Category in Jiangxi Province has steadily increased from 25 students in 2021 to 33 in 2026, reflecting emphasis on Jiangxi student sources.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 4283, a 3.125% enrollment expansion in 2026, a 0.46% slight increase in total candidates, continuous rise in Shanghai Ranking, and stable popularity of liberal arts majors, competition in 2026 for History Category is expected to ease slightly compared to 2025, with rankings shifting slightly downward. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 4393, with a range of 3893–4893.
